person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Matthias I (1119 - 13 May 1176) was the duke of Lorraine from 1138 to his death as the eldest son and successor of Simon I and Adelaide. Like his forefathers going back to Theodoric II and even to Adalbert, he was a stern supporter of the king of Germany and Holy Roman Emperor. He married Bertha (sometimes called Judith), daughter of Frederick II, Duke of Swabia, and therefore niece of the Hohenstaufen king Conrad III and sister of Frederick Barbarossa, future emperor.

He accompanied Barbarossa on a number of important occasions, including his imperial coronation by Pope Adrian IV in Rome, 1155. He assisted the emperor in his wars against Adrian and his successor Alexander III and the kings of France and Sicily. He extended his own ducal demesne at the expense of the bishop of Toul, but was an important donor to the Church and founder of abbeys. He died in 1176 and was interred in his abbey of Clairlieu in Villers-lès-Nancy.

«b»By his Hohenstaufen marriage (1138), he had:«/b»
1.) Simon (died 1205), his successor in Lorraine

2.) Frederick (died 1206), count of Bitche and his nephew's successor

3.) Judith (died 1173), married Stephen II, count of Auxonne (1170)

4.) Alice (died 1200), married Hugh III, Duke of Burgundy

5.) Theoderic (died 1181), bishop of Metz (1174-1179)

6.) Matthias (died 1208), count of Toul

7.) Unnamed daughter who died young

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine於1119年出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，他的父親Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine44歲，母親Adelheid van Leuven30歲。他於1139年3月25日與Bertha von Schwaben結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年5月13日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒維勒斯-利斯-南希享年57歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒維勒斯-利斯-南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine于1119年出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯时，他的父亲Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine44岁，母亲Adelheid van Leuven30岁。他于1139年3月25日与Bertha von Schwaben结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年5月13日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒維勒斯-利斯-南希享年57岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒維勒斯-利斯-南希。

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Débonnaire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English, Huguenot: nickname from Middle English debonaire, debonar, debone(u)re ‘mild, gentle, kind’ (Medieval French deboneire ‘meek, mild, humble’).

variants.name: Bonner
meanings: Irish: Benn, a mountain, and "er," a contraction for fear, a man, meaning a mountaineer

en.lifeSummary: When Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine was born in 1119, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, was 44 and his mother, Adelheid van Leuven, was 30. He married Bertha von Schwaben on 25 March 1139. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 May 1176, in Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine est né en 1119, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Leuven, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Bertha von Schwaben le 25 mars 1139. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1176, à Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine 1119 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine 44 und seine Mutter Adelheid van Leuven 30. Er hat am 25. März 1139 Bertha von Schwaben geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Mai 1176 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine è nato il nel 1119 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid van Leuven, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Bertha von Schwaben il 25 marzo 1139. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 maggio 1176, nel Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraineが1119年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraineは44歳，母Adelheid van Leuvenは30歳であった。1139年3月25日にBertha von Schwabenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1176年5月13日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴィラース-ルeス-ナンシで57歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴィラース-ルeス-ナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine(이)가 1119년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid van Leuven(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1139년 3월 25일 Bertha von Schwaben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 5월 13일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 비레르스-e스-난시에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 비레르스-e스-난시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine nasceu em 1119, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Leuven, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha von Schwaben em 25 de março de 1139. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de maio de 1176, em Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine родился в 1119 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Leuven, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha von Schwaben 25 марта 1139 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 мая 1176 г. в местности виллирс-лeс-нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности виллирс-лeс-нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathieu Ier dit le Débonnaire duc de Lorraine nació en 1119, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Leuven, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Bertha von Schwaben el 25 de marzo de 1139. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1176, en Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Villers-lès-Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.
